params.name: Ariadne's Thread
params.description:
On Aug 7, 2850 BC, Ariadne presented this thread to Theseus, who was about to enter the labyrinth.
This ball of thread was presented to Theseus by Princess Ariadne of Crete. To end the tradition of sending virgins as tributes to the Minotaur, Theseus disguised as a tribute, went to Crete to kill the Minotaur, and earned Ariande's love and help. She gave Theseus the ball of thread and told him to take it with him as he ventured into the labyrinth, kill the monsters, and lead others out followi …
